chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Made Permissible and Prohibited in Marriage

text: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ اَلرَّجُلُ يُصِيبُ مِنْ أُخْتِ اِمْرَأَتِهِ حَرَاماً أَ يُحَرِّمُ ذَلِكَ عَلَيْهِ اِمْرَأَتَهُ فَقَالَ "إِنَّ اَلْحَرَامَ لاَ يُفْسِدُ اَلْحَلاَلَ وَ اَلْحَلاَلُ يَصْلُحُ بِهِ اَلْحَرَامُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4455 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Abdullah ibn Sinan, who said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man who commits a forbidden act with his wife's sister. Does this make his wife forbidden to him?
Imam (as) said: "Indeed, the forbidden does not invalidate the lawful, and the lawful rectifies the forbidden."
